action.reasoning: Observation: test spearman 0.26 vs val 0.78 indicates severe overfitting due to two_vs_many split. Frozen embeddings + small head cannot generalize to higher-order mutants. Analysis: Need a more expressive model that can adapt representations to mutation patterns. Fine-tuning a smaller ESM2 (35M) on full sequences with region pooling can better capture epistasis and generalize. Decision: implement end-to-end fine-tuning of ESM2-12_35M, train for few epochs, submit eval to measure improvement.
